title: LOST — Mama checks her phone
prompt: Wide front-row interior shot of @jeep-interior — the Jeep is already stopped on a sandy fork in the road. EXACTLY TWO ADULTS in the front seats, no kids visible (kids off-camera in the back). @Mama in the driver seat on the LEFT, blonde ponytail, both hands holding her phone in front of her, brow furrowed, the phone screen showing zero signal bars and a spinning loading icon. @Papa in the passenger seat on the RIGHT, beard and glasses, leaning over slightly to peek at Mama's phone screen, eyebrows up in mild concern. Through the windshield ahead: @magic-forest-sandy stretches in two directions, identical-looking pine trunks fading into the distance — no clear right answer. Mama (poking at the phone, eyebrow raised): "...no service? In the MIDDLE of nowhere?" Papa (squinting at the phone, then up at the road): "...are we lost?" Mama (wry smile, quiet): "...a little. Don't tell the kids. Yet." Papa (grinning): "My lips are sealed."
